no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen did not expose a stable seed
prompt: Create a production source sheet for Ember Road fantasy forge UI frame pieces. Arrange as a clean row-major grid on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background with at least 64px outer margin and 56px gutters between every visible pixel and shadow. Assets requested, one isolated component per slot: blank right equipment/result rail panel with large safe parchment center; blank bottom log belt with safe empty parchment center; blank primary command button base default; blank primary command button pressed; blank disabled/locked button base; small reward/equipment slot frame; small route plaque frame; small depth marker plaque; corner ornament caps; separate ember gem overlay; separate lock medallion overlay; thin divider strip; small top status bar segment. Ornate but restrained painterly fantasy browser RPG UI, brass, iron, dark leather, parchment, ember gold highlights, muted red cloth accents. Slice9-safe design: centers and long edges must be plain/repeatable; unique ornaments must be corner caps or separate overlay sprites.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, fake glyphs, labels, counters, watermarks, copied reference-game UI ornament shapes, complete gameplay screen, characters, backgrounds, HUD text, inventory contents, screenshots, #00ff00 inside UI pieces, cropped frames, touching shadows, merged components, busy stretch centers, fake letters, logos, one fused screenshot, mobile VIP/event clutter, panel-only shop UI
source_family_role: cuttable slice9-safe equipment/result rail, bottom log belt, button states, reward slots, route/depth plaques, corner caps, ember gem, lock medallion, divider, and status segment
rejected_candidate_notes: Accepted as first town forge frame/source sheet. Slice9 audit must assign stretch-safe centers and keep ornate caps/medallions as fixed overlays or corners only.
